name: NotebookLM
api_notes: The API is part of the NotebookLM Enterprise offering and covers core notebook management tasks like creation, retrieval, listing, deletion, and sharing.
one_liner: NotebookLM is an AI-powered research assistant that analyzes documents to generate insights, summaries, and audio overviews, with an enterprise API for programmatic notebook management.
blocker: The API is restricted to enterprise-licensed users and requires administrative configuration in Google Cloud; it is not a self-serve developer API.
auth_notes: Uses OAuth2 bearer tokens via gcloud authentication.
mcp_notes: There is no official vendor-provided MCP server, but community-maintained options (e.g., notebooklm-mcp-cli) exist.
access_notes: Requires an enterprise agreement, specifically a Gemini Enterprise or Education Premium add-on license, and admin-level setup in a Google Cloud project.

evidence.claim: The NotebookLM Enterprise API allows programmatic notebook management including creation, retrieval, and sharing.
Access to the API requires a paid enterprise license (Gemini Enterprise or Education Premium).
There is no public consumer API for NotebookLM; it is exclusively for enterprise customers.
Search citation: NotebookLM API in 2026: Official Enterprise API, Limits, and Alternatives | AutoContent API Blog
